description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Unit test that runs on pull requests, pushes to the master branch, and workflow dispatches. The workflow has multiple jobs: build, test, render_gallery, build_test_windows, and tests_complete. The build job compiles the code in a matrix of configurations, tests the code on ubuntu-latest and self-hosted GPU runners, and uploads artifacts. The test and render_gallery jobs depend on the build job and run tests and render gallery images respectively. The build_test_windows job builds and tests on Windows. The tests_complete job requires all other jobs to complete.
